name: Kairos
description: Immutable Linux meta-distribution for edge Kubernetes, enabling bootable K8s and OS images for edge devices.

seo.title: Kairos — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Kairos: Immutable Linux meta-distribution for edge Kubernetes, enabling bootable K8s and OS images for edge devices.

when_to_use: Immutable Linux for edge Kubernetes with bootable OS images
Declarative edge K8s deployment with GitOps and OTA updates
Secure edge computing with measured boot and TPM support
Building custom bootable Kubernetes appliances for edge
Zero-touch provisioning of edge nodes from cloud configuration

pros: Works across ARM and x86 devices
review.verdict: Compelling choice for immutable edge Kubernetes, but still young and community-driven.
review.best_for: Edge computing teams running fleets of Kubernetes devices needing immutable OS
review.not_for: Traditional datacenter workloads or teams without Kubernetes experience

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
